news.paragraph: Alibaba recently reported its fiscal Q4 and March quarter 2026 results, which led to a share price retreat after revenue missed analyst estimates. While the company is seeing significant momentum in its cloud and AI segments, the high costs associated with its AI push have caused adjusted earnings to fall. Options traders should consider this conflict between strong sector growth and overall earnings pressure.
headlines: Alibaba Cloud Growth Explodes, But Earnings Evaporate In Costly AI Push
Alibaba shares retreat after quarterly revenue falls short of forecasts despite cloud and AI momentum (BABA)
Alibaba stock slides as revenue misses estimates despite strong cloud, AI growth
Alibaba Fiscal Q4 Adjusted Earnings Fall, Revenue Rises; Shares Down Pre-Bell
Alibaba Group Announces March Quarter 2026 and Fiscal Year 2026 Results
Alibaba Group (BABA) Is One Of The Stocks Michael Burry Is Backing In 2026
